title: tribulus cistoides
intro: Tribulus cistoides, also known as puncture vine or small caltrop, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Tribulus genus. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tribulus cistoides are attributed to its ability to improve cardiovascular health, boost libido, and enhance athletic performance. Tribulus cistoides is often prepared as an herbal supplement, tea, or tincture, and is commonly used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asia and Europe.
